Part.Source:
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor
MB 4 MT 2
Header If &FatFilCod = 0 &titulo = 'RELAÇÃO DE CONHECIMENTOS: TODAS AS FILIAIS' Else For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &FatFilCod
&titulo = 'RELAÇÃO DE CONHECIMENTOS: ' + trim(FilRaz) Exit EndFor EndIF
print Cabecalho End
if &TipoPeriodo = 'B' &DataPeriodo = 'Faturamento Pedido:' Else &DataPeriodo = 'Lançamento Frete:' EndIF
If &TipoRelatorio = 'T' &TotalTransportadora = 'Total Transportadora:' Else &TotalTransportadora = 'Total UF:' EndIF
&OldFrtTraCod = 0 &OldPedCliEntUfeCod = ''
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCnhTraCod, LctAtuSal, PedCod when &TipoRelatorio = 'T' //RELATORIO POR TRANPORTADORA Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCliEntUfeCod, LctAtuSal, PedCod when &TipoRelatorio = 'E' //RELATORIO POR UF
Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCliEntUfeCod = &PedCliEntUfeCod when not &PedCliEntUfeCod.IsEmpty() Where PedCnhTraCod = &FrtTraCod when &FrtTraCod <> 0 where PedCnhTraCod <> 0 Where (PedDtaFat >= &iniPedDtaFat and PedDtaFat <= &fimPedDtaFat) when &TipoPeriodo = 'B'//DATA FATURAMENTO Where (PedCnhEms >= &iniPedDtaFat and PedCnhEms <= &fimPedDtaFat) when &TipoPeriodo = 'A'//DATA LCTO FRETE Where not PedCnhFrt.IsEmpty() and not PedCnhFrt.IsNull() and PedCnhVlr <> 0
&NfeFilCod = RetornaFilialNota.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) &PedCod = PedCod &PedFilCod = FilCod
If &FatFilCod = &NfeFilCod or &FatFilCod = 0 if &TipoRelatorio = 'T' If &OldFrtTraCod <> PedCnhTraCod do 'TotalEntradaSaida'
if &OldFrtTraCod <> 0 do 'TotalTransportadora'
Eject EndIF
&OldFrtTraCod = PedCnhTraCod RetornaNomePessoa.Call(EmpCod, PedCnhTraCod, &FrtTraRaz) &FrtTraCodRaz = trim(str(PedCnhTraCod)) + ' - ' + trim(&FrtTraRaz)
print tituloTransportadora
&IsImprimeSaldo = true EndIF Else //Tipo UF
RetornaNomePessoa.Call(EmpCod, PedCnhTraCod, &FrtTraRaz) &PedTraRedCodRaz = trim(str(PedCnhTraCod)) + ' - ' + trim(&FrtTraRaz)
If &OldPedCliEntUfeCod <> PedCliEntUfeCod do 'TotalEntradaSaida'
if not &OldPedCliEntUfeCod.IsEmpty() do 'TotalTransportadora'
Eject EndIF
&OldPedCliEntUfeCod = PedCliEntUfeCod &CidUfeCodNom = PedCliEntUfeCod.Trim() + ' - ' + PedCliEntUfeNom.Trim()
print TituloEstado
&IsImprimeSaldo = true EndIF EndIf
if &OldLctAtuSal <> LctAtuSal or &IsImprimeSaldo = true &IsImprimeSaldo = false
do 'TotalEntradaSaida'
&OldLctAtuSal = LctAtuSal &EntradaSaida = UPPER(LctAtuSal.EnumerationDescription())
if &TipoRelatorio = 'T' print tituloConhecimento Else print tituloConhecimentoEstado EndIF EndIf
&PedCliRaz = substr(PedCliRaz, 1, 30)
&Percentual = 0 if PedCnhVlr > 0 and PedVlrLiq > 0 &Percentual = (PedCnhVlr / PedVlrLiq) * 100 Endif
do 'getCotacao'
&PercentualCobrado = 0 if PedVlrFrt > 0 and &CotVlr > 0 &PercentualCobrado = (PedVlrFrt / &CotVlr) * 100 Endif
RetornaNotaAutorizadaPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &PedFilCod, &PedCod, &NfeNum)
&TipoFreteRed = Substr(trim(PedTipFrt.EnumerationDescription()), 1, 1) &TipoFreteSai = Substr(trim(PedTipSaiFrt.EnumerationDescription()), 1, 1)
if &TipoRelatorio = 'T' print Pedido Else print PedidoEstado EndIF
&TotalCotacao(1) += &CotVlr &PedVlrLiq(1) += PedVlrLiq &PedVlrFrt(1) += PedVlrFrt &PedCnhVlr(1) += PedCnhVlr
&TotalCotacao(2) += &CotVlr &PedVlrLiq(2) += PedVlrLiq &PedVlrFrt(2) += PedVlrFrt &PedCnhVlr(2) += PedCnhVlr
&TotalCotacao(3) += &CotVlr &PedVlrLiq(3) += PedVlrLiq &PedVlrFrt(3) += PedVlrFrt &PedCnhVlr(3) += PedCnhVlr EndIF EndFor
do 'TotalEntradaSaida' do 'TotalTransportadora'
If &PedVlrLiq(3) > 0 or &PedVlrFrt(3) > 0 or &PedCnhVlr(3) > 0 or &TotalCotacao(3) > 0 if &PedCnhVlr(3) > 0 and &PedVlrLiq(3) > 0 &Percentual = (&PedCnhVlr(3) / &PedVlrLiq(3)) * 100 else &Percentual = 0 Endif
&PercentualCobrado = 0 if &TotalCotacao(3) > 0 and &PedVlrFrt(3) > 0 &PercentualCobrado = (&PedVlrFrt(3) / &TotalCotacao(3)) * 100 Endif
print TotalGeral EndIF
Footer print Rodape End
Sub 'getCotacao' &CotVlr = 0 For Each Order EmpCod, CotFilCod, CotPedCod, CotIs Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CotFilCod = &PedFilCod Where CotPedCod = &PedCod Where CotIs = true
&CotVlr = CotVlr
Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'TotalTransportadora' If &PedVlrLiq(2) > 0 or &PedVlrFrt(2) > 0 or &PedCnhVlr(2) > 0 or &TotalCotacao(2) > 0 if &PedCnhVlr(2) > 0 and &PedVlrLiq(2) > 0 &Percentual = (&PedCnhVlr(2) / &PedVlrLiq(2)) * 100 else &Percentual = 0 Endif
&PercentualCobrado = 0 if &TotalCotacao(2) > 0 and &PedVlrFrt(2) > 0 &PercentualCobrado = (&PedVlrFrt(2) / &TotalCotacao(2)) * 100 Endif
print TotalTransportadora &TotalCotacao(2) = 0 &PedVlrLiq(2) = 0 &PedVlrFrt(2) = 0 &PedCnhVlr(2) = 0 EndIF EndSub
sub 'TotalEntradaSaida' If &PedVlrLiq(1) > 0 or &PedVlrFrt(1) > 0 or &PedCnhVlr(1) > 0 or &TotalCotacao(1) > 0 if &PedCnhVlr(1) > 0 and &PedVlrLiq(1) > 0 &Percentual = (&PedCnhVlr(1) / &PedVlrLiq(1)) * 100 else &Percentual = 0 Endif
&PercentualCobrado = 0 if &TotalCotacao(1) > 0 and &PedVlrFrt(1) > 0 &PercentualCobrado = (&PedVlrFrt(1) / &TotalCotacao(1)) * 100 Endif
print TotalPedidos &TotalCotacao(1) = 0 &PedVlrLiq(1) = 0 &PedVlrFrt(1) = 0 &PedCnhVlr(1) = 0 EndIF EndSub

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão deste documento!

Part.Source:
parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&FatFilCod, in:&FrtTraCod, in:&iniPedDtaFat, in:&fimPedDtaFat, in:&PedCliEntUfeCod, in:&TipoPeriodo, in:&TipoRelatorio);
output_file(&Pgmname, 'PDF');
